recent_announcements.summary: The Exchange had sought clarification from MMTC Limited for the quarter ended 31-Mar-2026 with respect to Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. On basis of above the Company was required to clarify the following:   -1. The company has not submitted the Statement of Impact of Audit Qualifications in case of modified opinion(s) The response of the Company is enclosed. |SUBJECT: Reply to Clarification- Financial results
